mapper.select:
SELECT usm.sw_id , usm.sw_nm , usm.sw_expl , usm.upd_scop_cd , cd1.cd_nm cdNm1 , DECODE(usm.cust_dstrbnc_fct_yn,'Y','고객 방해 요소 있음','고객 방해 요소 없음') custDstrbncFctYn , usm.sw_intro_msg , usm.sw_inst_path , usm.hash_yn , usm.hash_algo_cd , usm.prereboot_yn , usm.postreboot_yn , usm.uiapp_yn , usm.skaf_fg_cd , usm.dvc_modl_tot_tgt_yn , usm.del_yn , usm.use_yn , usm.stm_fir_reg_date , usm.stm_fir_reg_user_id , (select count(*) from um_sw_file_dtl usfd where 1=1 and usm.sw_id = usfd.sw_id(+) and usfd.del_yn ='N' ) dvcCnt , NVL(usr.user_nm, usm.stm_fir_reg_user_id) as stm_fir_reg_user_nm , NVL( CASE WHEN usm.dvc_fg_cd = 1 -- STB 모델 이름 리스트 THEN ( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(sm.model_name) FROM um_sw_dvc_map usdm , stb_model sm WHERE usdm.modl_cd = sm.model_code AND usm.sw_id = usdm.sw_id ) WHEN usm.dvc_fg_cd = 2 -- RCU 모델 이름 리스트 THEN ( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(damm.acc_modl_nm) FROM um_sw_dvc_map usdm , dm_acc_modl_mst damm WHERE usdm.modl_cd = damm.acc_modl_id AND usm.sw_id = usdm.sw_id ) ELSE NULL END, '[]' ) AS modelNameList FROM um_sw_mst usm ,ad_comm_cd cd1 ,ad_user_mst usr
,( select sw_id from um_sw_mst where dvc_modl_tot_tgt_yn='Y' union all select s.sw_id from um_sw_mst s , um_sw_dvc_map m where m.modl_cd=#{modlCd} and s.sw_id=m.sw_id and s.dvc_modl_tot_tgt_yn!='Y' ) usdmap
nvl(usm.upd_scop_cd, '1') = cd1.comm_cd(+) AND cd1.comm_grp_cd = 'UPD_SCOP_CD' AND usr.user_id(+) = usm.stm_fir_reg_user_id AND usm.del_yn != 'Y'
AND usm.sw_id = usdmap.sw_id
AND UPPER(usm.sw_nm) like UPPER('%'||#{swNm}||'%')
AND usm.upd_scop_cd = #{updScopCd}
AND usm.use_yn = #{useYn}
AND usm.dvc_fg_cd = #{dvcFgCd}
AND UPPER(NVL(usr.user_nm, usm.stm_fir_reg_user_id)) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{stmFirRegUserNm} || '%')
AND ( ( usm.dvc_fg_cd = 1 -- STB 디바이스 AND ( ( -- STB 모델 전체 사용 시 검색, 대상 모델이 전체라도 실제 존재하는 모델을 찾기위함 usm.dvc_modl_tot_tgt_yn = 'Y' AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stb_model sm WHERE UPPER(sm.model_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{modelName} || '%') ) > 0 ) OR ( -- STB 모델 일부 사용 시 검색 usm.dvc_modl_tot_tgt_yn = 'N' AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM um_sw_dvc_map usdm , stb_model sm WHERE usdm.modl_cd = sm.model_code AND usm.sw_id = usdm.sw_id AND UPPER(sm.model_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{modelName} || '%') ) > 0 ) ) ) OR ( usm.dvc_fg_cd = 2 -- RCU 디바이스 AND ( ( -- RCU 모델 전체 사용 시 검색, 대상 모델이 전체라도 실제 존재하는 모델을 찾기위함 usm.dvc_modl_tot_tgt_yn = 'Y' AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dm_acc_modl_mst damm WHERE UPPER(damm.acc_modl_nm) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{modelName} || '%') ) > 0 ) OR ( -- RCU 모델 일부 사용 시 검색 usm.dvc_modl_tot_tgt_yn = 'N' AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM um_sw_dvc_map usdm , dm_acc_modl_mst damm WHERE usdm.modl_cd = damm.acc_modl_id AND usm.sw_id = usdm.sw_id AND UPPER(damm.acc_modl_nm) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{modelName} || '%') ) > 0 ) ) ) )
ORDER BY usm.stm_last_upd_date desc

SELECT usfd.sw_file_id , usfd.sw_id , usfd.sw_file_nm , usfd.stb_cmcl_fg_cd , cd1.cd_nm cdNm1 , usfd.sw_file_sz , usfd.sw_file_ver , usfd.sw_file_dc_info , usfd.sw_file_frct_inst_tm , DECODE(usfd.sw_file_dc_info,null,'N','Y') swFileDcInfoYn , usfd.sw_file_local_path , usfd.ecdn_lnkd_sts_cd , cd2.cd_nm cdNm2 , usfd.rty_cnt , usfd.ecrt_salt , usfd.stb_ui_ver , usfd.sw_file_expl , usfd.sw_file_intro_msg , usfd.dvc_modl_tot_tgt_yn , NVL(to_char(usfd.file_conf_date,'yyyy.MM.dd HH24:MI:SS'),' ' ) as fileConfDate , NVL(to_char(usfd.stm_fir_reg_date,'yyyy.MM.dd HH24:MI:SS'),' ' ) as stmFirRegDate , usfd.stm_fir_reg_user_id , NVL(to_char(usfd.stm_last_upd_date,'yyyy.MM.dd HH24:MI:SS'),' ' ) as stmLastUpdDate , NVL(usfd.stm_last_upd_user_id,' ') as stmLastUpdUserId , aum.user_nm stmFirRegUserNm , usfd.SW_FILE_FG_CD , usfd.ecrt_algo_cd , usfd.revision , usfd.acc_sw_fil_modl_nm FROM um_sw_mst usm ,um_sw_file_dtl usfd, ad_comm_cd cd1 , ad_user_mst aum , ad_comm_cd cd2 WHERE 1=1 AND usm.sw_id = usfd.sw_id(+) AND usfd.stb_cmcl_fg_cd = cd1.comm_cd(+) AND cd1.comm_grp_cd = 'STB_CMCL_FG_CD' AND usfd.ecdn_lnkd_sts_cd = cd2.comm_cd(+) AND cd2.comm_grp_cd = 'ECDN_LNKD_STS_CD' AND usfd.stm_fir_reg_user_id = aum.user_id(+) AND usfd.sw_id = #{swId} AND usfd.sw_file_id = #{swFileId}

SELECT m.plan_id , m.plan_nm , m.modl_cd , sm.model_name , uupsm.stb_sw_ver , m.upd_sts_fg_cd , c.cd_nm cdNm1 , d.cd_nm cdNm2 , m.stm_fir_reg_date , m.stm_fir_reg_user_id FROM um_upd_plan_mst m , stb_model sm,ad_comm_cd c ,ad_comm_cd d , um_upd_plan_sw_map uupsm , um_sw_file_dtl usfd WHERE usfd.sw_id = uupsm.sw_id AND usfd.sw_file_id = uupsm.sw_file_id AND uupsm.plan_id = m.plan_id AND m.modl_cd = sm.model_code AND m.upd_sts_fg_cd = c.comm_cd AND c.comm_grp_cd = 'UPD_STS_FG_CD' AND usfd.STB_CMCL_FG_CD = d.comm_cd AND d.comm_grp_cd = 'STB_CMCL_FG_CD' AND usfd.sw_file_ver = #{swFileVer} AND usfd.sw_id = #{swId} ORDER BY stm_fir_reg_date desc
SELECT stb_ui_ver FROM dm_ui_ver_mst WHERE use_yn ='Y' ORDER BY stb_ui_ver
SELECT usm.sw_nm , usfd.sw_file_ver , usfd.stm_fir_reg_date , usfd.stm_fir_reg_user_id FROM um_sw_file_dtl usfd , um_sw_mst usm WHERE usfd.sw_id = usm.sw_id AND usfd.sw_file_id = #{swFileDcInfo}
SELECT distinct usfd.stm_fir_reg_user_id , aum.user_nm stmFirRegUserNm FROM um_sw_file_dtl usfd , ad_user_mst aum WHERE 1=1 AND aum.user_id = usfd.stm_fir_reg_user_id
SELECT sw_id FROM um_sw_mst WHERE stm_fir_reg_date = (select MAX(stm_fir_reg_date) from um_sw_mst)

SELECT usm.sw_id , usm.sw_nm , usm.sw_expl , usm.sw_offc_fg_cd , usm.upd_scop_cd , usm.cust_dstrbnc_fct_yn , usm.sw_intro_msg , usm.sw_inst_path , usm.hash_yn , usm.hash_algo_cd , usm.prereboot_yn , usm.postreboot_yn , usm.uiapp_yn , usm.skaf_fg_cd , usm.dvc_modl_tot_tgt_yn , usm.del_yn , usm.use_yn FROM um_sw_mst usm WHERE 1=1 AND usm.sw_id = #{swId}
SELECT sw_id , modl_cd FROM um_sw_dvc_map WHERE sw_id = #{swId}
SELECT SW_FILE_NM AS FILE_NAME , ECDN_FILE_URL , RTY_CNT , STM_FIR_REG_USER_ID , STM_FIR_REG_DATE FROM UM_ECDN_SW_FILE_ERR_HST ORDER BY STM_FIR_REG_DATE DESC
SELECT acc_modl_id, acc_sw_fil_modl_nm_loc_start, acc_sw_fil_modl_nm_loc_end FROM dm_acc_modl_mst
